title: Monday partner in Sunshine Coast or Brisbane, Aus

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community,

We have a client located between Brisbane and Sunshine Coast who would like to engage with someone in-person for the length of the project.

Who do we have here that in located in QLD, Aus and open to in-person project?

This will be your client going forward. We will do the intro :).

posts.author: Fruition (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ElenaK,

We have a team member based locally in Brisbane. Happy to see if they are open to support.

Shall we connect over email?

Kind regards,

Josh

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Elena

Welcome to the community

I’ll ensure the project is executed smoothly and efficiently.

My approach will focus on identifying pain points, optimizing processes, and implementing effective automation solutions.
Few point like

Conduct a comprehensive needs analysis to tailor the solution.
Design and implement automation workflows using Make.com and Zapier.
